zh.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Harthill是Adam De Herthull和Mrs. Christina Herthill的兒子，出生在英國瓦維其可爾。他於大約1335年與Alice Astley在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1390年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾斯利，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Harthill是Adam De Herthull和Mrs. Christina Herthill的儿子，出生在英国瓦維其可爾。他于大约1335年与Alice Astley在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾斯利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1390年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾斯利，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾波萊斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harthill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places called Harthill (Cheshire, Derbys, and WR Yorks).
2  Scottish: locative name from Harthill near Inverurie (Aberdeens) or, less likely, from the barony of Harthill (Lanarks).

variants.name: Hartell
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Hartle  .
Americanized form of German Hartel or Härtel.

variants.name: Hartles
meanings: English: variant of Hartle ( see Harthill ) with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Hartill
meanings: English (Staffordshire) and Scottish: variant of   Hartle  .

variants.name: Hartle
meanings: German (also Härtle): from a pet form of the various ancient Germanic compound names formed with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’ as the first element.

English (Worcestershire and Staffordshire): habitational name from any of the three places called Harthill (Cheshire, Derbyshire, and Yorkshire), named with Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + hyll ‘hill’.
Scottish: habitational name from Harthill near Inverurie (Aberdeenshire) or, less likely, from the barony of Harthill (Lanarkshire), probably from the same etymology as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Harthill was born in Warwickshire, England as the son of Adam De Herthull and Mrs. Christina Herthill. He married Alice Astley about 1335, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1390, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Polesworth, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Harthill est né à Warwickshire, Angleterre, fils de Adam De Herthull et Mrs. Christina Herthill. Il a épousé Alice Astley environ 1335, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1390, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Polesworth, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Harthill wurde in Warwickshire, England, als Sohn von Adam De Herthull und Mrs. Christina Herthill geboren. Er hat um 1335 in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Astley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1390 in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Polesworth, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Harthill è nato il nel Warwickshire, England come figlio di Adam De Herthull e Mrs. Christina Herthill. Lui sposato Alice Astley circa 1335, nel Astley, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1390, nel Astley, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Polesworth, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De HarthillはイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでAdam De HerthullとMrs. Christina Herthillの息子として生まれた。約1335年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーでAlice Astleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1390年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアポレスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Harthill(은)는 영국 워윅실르에서 Adam De Herthull(와)과 Mrs. Christina Herthill의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 Alice Astley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 포레스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Harthill nasceu em Warwickshire, Inglaterra filho de Adam De Herthull e Mrs. Christina Herthill. Ele casou-se com Alice Astley aproximadamente 1335, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1390, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Polesworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Harthill родился в местности варвиккшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Adam De Herthull и Mrs. Christina Herthill. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Astley около 1335 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1390 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности полесворт, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Harthill nació en Warwickshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Adam De Herthull y Mrs. Christina Herthill. Se casó con Alice Astley aproximadamente 1335, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1390, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Polesworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
